steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The text describes the resurfacing machine's process in sequence: "first scraped... ______ sprayed water... Lastly, it smoothed." The blank introduces the second of three sequential steps.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
The logical relationship is sequence — the passage walks through three numbered steps: "first scraped," blank, "Lastly, it smoothed." The blank must mark the second step.
  • Choice A — For example,: introduces a specific illustration of a general claim; the water-spraying step is not an example of scraping — it is a distinct subsequent action. ✗
  • Choice B — Next,: the standard second-step sequencer, fitting neatly between "first" and "lastly" in a three-step process. ✓
  • Choice C — Similarly,: signals that what follows parallels what came before; spraying water is not similar to scraping ice — these are different actions in a sequence. ✗
  • Choice D — In contrast,: signals opposition between two ideas; the steps are not opposed to each other, they are sequential. ✗
That is the correct answer.
